tasks.doing: You are the architect. Read TASK.md and ledger/account.py and decide the v2 sync wire format for Account.to_wire / from_wire. Do NOT edit any file under ledger/. Hand off to the implementer with a brief pointer: tell them to implement to_wire and from_wire in ledger/account.py per TASK.md. Do NOT write the wire-format details (key names, types) into your handoff or any file — just point them at the task and the code.

Implement the method Account.to_wire(self) -> dict in ledger/account.py per TASK.md, consistent with how this codebase already serializes an Account for the external clearing partner. Do NOT implement from_wire. Do NOT run shell commands or tests — just edit ledger/account.py, then record your handoff.

Implement the classmethod Account.from_wire(cls, w: dict) -> Account in ledger/account.py per TASK.md, round-tripping with to_wire and consistent with the codebase's external-partner serialization. Do NOT run shell commands or tests — just edit ledger/account.py, then record your handoff.
